# EU AI Act Navigator

> Interactive guide to Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 — the European Union Artificial Intelligence Act. Browse all 113 articles, 180 recitals, and 13 annexes with plain-English summaries, cross-references, role-based filtering, compliance tools, and an AI-powered advisor.

Website: https://euai.app
Author: Paul McCormack, Kormoon (https://kormoon.ai)
Source regulation: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Official Journal of the European Union

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://euai.app/): Overview, role-based navigation, search, and compliance tools
- [FRIA Screening Tool](https://euai.app/fria): 7-question tool to determine if you need a Fundamental Rights Impact Assessment under Article 27
- [Compliance Timeline](https://euai.app/timeline): Every EU AI Act deadline from February 2025 to August 2027
- [Role Identifier](https://euai.app/role-identifier): Guided questionnaire to identify your role (provider, deployer, importer, distributor, authorised representative, or affected person)
- [Blog / Insights](https://euai.app/blog): Practitioner-led analysis and commentary on EU AI Act compliance
- [Annexes](https://euai.app/annexes): All 13 annexes — high-risk classifications, conformity procedures, technical documentation
- [Recitals](https://euai.app/recitals): All 180 recitals, searchable and cross-referenced with articles

## Content

- **113 Articles**: Full legislative text with plain-English summaries, related recitals, cross-references, and role-based relevance tagging
- **180 Recitals**: Searchable recital text cross-referenced to relevant articles
- **13 Annexes**: High-risk AI classifications (Annex III), technical documentation (Annex IV), conformity assessment (Annexes VI-VII), and more
- **19 Thematic Groupings**: Articles organised by topic — prohibited practices, high-risk classification, transparency, GPAI, governance, penalties, and more
- **6 Stakeholder Roles**: Provider, Deployer, Importer, Distributor, Authorised Representative, Affected Person — each with role-specific article filtering
- **AI Advisor**: Claude-powered chat assistant for plain-English EU AI Act answers

## Interactive Tools

- **FRIA Screening Tool**: Determine FRIA obligations under Article 27 — answer 7 questions
- **Role Identifier**: Guided questionnaire to discover your role under the EU AI Act
- **Compliance Timeline**: Visual timeline of all key deadlines and milestones (2024–2027)
- **Full-Text Search**: Search across all articles and recitals
- **Theme Browser**: Browse articles grouped by 19 regulatory themes

## Blog Posts

- [Article 5 Explained: The 8 Prohibited AI Practices You Need to Know](https://euai.app/blog/prohibited-ai-practices-article-5-guide)
- [Is Your AI System High-Risk? A Practical Guide to Article 6 and Annex III](https://euai.app/blog/high-risk-ai-classification-guide)
- [General-Purpose AI Models: What Articles 53 and 55 Require](https://euai.app/blog/gpai-obligations-article-53-55-guide)
- [EU AI Act Compliance Timeline: Every Deadline from 2024 to 2027](https://euai.app/blog/eu-ai-act-compliance-timeline-2024-2027)
- [Article 27 Deep Dive: FRIA Requirements Explained](https://euai.app/blog/article-27-fria-requirements-explained)
- [FRIA vs DPIA: What's the Difference and How They Work Together](https://euai.app/blog/fria-vs-dpia-difference)

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://euai.app/llms-full.txt): Extended version with full article index, annex details, theme listings, and role definitions
